    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Set<PIIType>
    SPGConfig.getEnabledTypes()
    Returns the set of enabled types; empty set means all types are enabled.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    SPGConfig.Builder
    SPGConfig.Builder.enabledTypes(Set<PIIType> types)
    Restricts detection to the specified PII types.

  • Uses of PIIType in com.semanticprivacyguard.model

    Subclasses with type arguments of type PIIType in com.semanticprivacyguard.model
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    enum 
    PIIType
    Enumeration of all PII (Personally Identifiable Information) types that Semantic Privacy Guard can detect and redact.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    PIIMatch.getType()

    PIIType.values()
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Map<PIIType,Long>
    StreamRedactionSummary.getMatchCountByType()
    Returns an unmodifiable map from PIIType to the number of times that type was detected across all lines.
